# Hyper Digital

> Hyper Digital is a New Zealand digital marketing agency that helps trade and local businesses (plumbers, electricians, roofers, builders, HVAC, painters and similar) win more work through Google Ads, smart websites and AI automation. Based in Hawke's Bay, working with tradies NZ-wide since 2019.

We focus on real outcomes for trade businesses: more phone calls and booked jobs at a predictable cost per lead, not vanity metrics. Every result we publish is something the client can verify in their own Google Ads, Search Console or Analytics account.

- Location: Hawke's Bay, New Zealand. Working with tradies nationwide.
- Phone: 027 666 1973
- Email: sales@hyperdigital.nz
- Guarantee: hit the agreed lead goal in 60 days, or we work for free until we do.

## Services

- [Lead generation (Google Ads)](https://hyperdigital.nz/lead-generation): Managed Google Ads search campaigns that put tradies in front of customers searching right now, driving calls and quote requests.
- [Smart websites](https://hyperdigital.nz/websites): Fast, mobile-first, search-ready websites that capture leads and book jobs 24/7. From $1,497 build + $197/month.
- [AI automation](https://hyperdigital.nz/ai-automation): Instant lead replies, job qualifying, automated follow-up and review generation so no lead or review is ever lost.

## Results and case studies

- [Results overview](https://hyperdigital.nz/results): Traceable results across 40+ Kiwi businesses, $1m+ ad spend managed, $4m+ tracked client revenue.
- [Bermuda Lifestyle (Pools & Spas)](https://hyperdigital.nz/results/bermuda-lifestyle): New website plus Google, Facebook and Instagram drove 2,500% more enquiries and 500% revenue growth in year one.
- [Houses On The Move (House Relocations)](https://hyperdigital.nz/results/houses-on-the-move): Cost per lead cut by more than half across a two-sided marketplace.
- [No Drips (Plumbing & Gas)](https://hyperdigital.nz/results/no-drips): Plumbing leads from as little as $14, well under the $45 target, after cutting inherited wasted spend.
- [Continuous Spouting (Spouting & Guttering)](https://hyperdigital.nz/results/continuous-spouting): A single tightly managed campaign delivering leads at under $6 each.
